rule: FDA/openFDA or ClinicalTrials.gov can verify context but cannot alone create a PIT tradable PDUFA calendar.
Public PDUFA calendars remain discovery-only until timestamp retention and negative-event checks pass.
If a source passes PIT audit it can feed a bounded exploratory Catalyst panel but not promotion without broader history and delisted coverage.
If pre-event timestamp or negative-retention fails the source is archived for trading research and kept only as qualitative context.
If no public source passes the PIT audit the Catalyst sleeve remains blocked until Citeline/BioMedTracker/Evaluate or equivalent commercial data is available.
